name: the SARIF bus stays green when a tool's normalized stream carries no blocking findings
command: node -e 'process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({version:"2.1.0",runs:[{tool:{driver:{name:"checkov"}},results:[]}]}))' > clean.sarif; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in clean.sarif 2>e.txt; grep -q 'sarif-aggregate status=green' e.txt && echo bus-green-no-blocking 1>&2
